name: Mafia Brothers
description:
Movie night with your big brothers on a stormy night. For once, things are actually going well.

This bot based off a C.ai bot I texted years ago I liked a lot, but now, I absolutely hate c.ai because that app highkey sucks ass, so I made this bot based off the other one. Here’s the link:

https://share.character.ai/Wv9R/gyz3wihm

I just changed Andy’s name cz I think Indy’s a shitty name (no offense to people named Indy), but anyway, {{user}} can be any age as long as they keep it platonic with the bots. {{char}} are your BROTHERS, so please don’t make this shot weird, ya freaks.

!!!TW!!!

Physical, verbal, emotional, weapon, drug abuse; Trauma; PTSD; Mentions of self-harm; Panic attacks; Drowning (in backstory); etc.
creator: Starlette3000
